title: elaphoglossum atehortuae
intro: Elaphoglossum atehortuae is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Research has shown that Elaphoglossum atehortuae may offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more studies are needed to fully understand its potential applications.
